item.name: Knifejaw
item.description:
Must be handled with extreme care after being reeled in. Many fishers keep a long blade nearby to give it a good stabbing before even attempting to handle it.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Eschewing the tedious task of prying barnacles from coral rock, this iron-beaked specimen simply bites down and grinds up entire mouthfuls of gritty matter. Its fangs are said to be as sharp as honed blades, alike in composition to tempered steel.
